name: blank scenarios + question
description:
hi a few things. ill delete this after a day or 2.

i added blank scenarios to most of my most popular characters. i didn't want to ping updates on every char. so this is the update to let u know. if you don't see one on the character you wanted, just lmk in comments and ill do it. i dont' rly like writing alts (i prefer to hop from char to char and my attention span is small and i dont rly have favs) so i figured this would be nice for ppl.

if ur curious about where else to find me or my stuff check my carrd on my profile. its a link to other stuff.

another thing, i wonder if ppl care about graphics or things like that. i enjoy making pictures (or putting up ones i like that other ppl made) like the real version of the bot. so ill keep doing that. but like other graphics and extra settings/vibe. i feel like that takes too much time but personally im the type of girl that just reads a char and dives in asap if i like it (i like using other ppls bots a lot too. i just have very specific taste) so i think im going reformat how i present a character. maybe use more trope tags, the spirit of the character and the basic plot. i use to barely write anything in the description when i made bots like baron and lars lmao. ill never take away real pics tho

also i think im going to make shorter bios as in character personality (like trying to keep things under 1700 tokens and adding anything above that to the lorebook but making it viewable). i am realizing and learning that large bios over a certain amount of tokens is actually detrimental to the character usually and the llm (even if you use a large corporate model) a lot of info just isn't represented in the chat so its moot and wastes tokens. so im going to do a different character format, try to use descriptive words instead of long sentences so i can lessen tokens. and use lorebooks more. hopefully that helps rps, its been helping mine. i'll keep it all open of course if people want to use the format as well.

you might have noticed i turn comments off on old bots. ya cause i hate moderating them. i do enjoy replying to people still so basically ill turn off comments after a few days on a new bot.

if u have lore questions, lmk. if ur wondering if a new bot is coming out, eventually. i make them when im in the mood to rp with them basically. if ur wondering if an alt is coming, the answer is prob no. i really don't enjoy making alts for old characters. i get bored of characters and want new stuff

the next few bots are actually 2 women and then back to making men. vault bot, prob an arena char, a intergalactic guy and a hale u titans guy prob rhodes. then prob finish up next gen bayou crew


edited:

in my server i added the sentence i felt represented each voodoo/bayou crew 'love'. when i made them, they were all diff variations of a love story at its core (what can i say, i really love love). added it here if ppl cared.

You love me where im at - Baron

Love always meant you and me - Jules

I looked for love and found you - Archie

Loving you means i always got you - Killian (for non english speaker, got you basically means like i'll always protect you/have your back not actually i have you)
my life started when i met you. there's no me without you - leon

i never slept good till i woke up next to you - kane

i don't feel much except when im with you. - dante
you were always going to end
creator: SEPHA
